pass_summary: Priority Move #4 — symbol propagation sweep + adjacent symbol-node commissions. Three new symbol-layer nodes commissioned (disguise, rooms, eerie) under wave-38 mechanical-keyword-primitive precedent. One existing node backfilled (manifest-dread) with three previously-unwired DSK anchors. Two cards upgraded to multi-symbol wiring (sanguine-savior, moldering-gym-weight-room).

orzhov_signet.rationale: All eight named candidates from orzhov-signet node body (Obzedat, Teysa, Karlov of the Ghost Council, Orzhov Pontiff, Imperious Oligarch, Seraph of the Scales, Kaya Orzhov Usurper, Orzhova) are not in corpus. Three Orzhov-adjacent corpus cards exist (Knight of the Last Breath RNA-188, Grasping Thrull RNA-177, Karlov Watchdog MKM-20) but none visually carry the four-pronged eclipsed-sun motif per their existing Vision passes. Karlov Watchdog has an embossed circular collar medallion that is more likely the separate Karlov-family-ouroboros sigil than the guild-wide eclipsed-sun signet (and the orzhov-signet node's caveats section warns explicitly about that conflation). Refused-with-receipts: visual confirmation pass on the eight named candidates is blocked on those cards entering corpus.

single_strike_emblem.rationale: No new Pokemon SWSH-era Single Strike subtype cards in corpus beyond the three already anchored (Scroll of Scorn, Urn of Vitality, Scroll of Piercing). Watch-signal: future Single Strike Urshifu V/VMAX or Tower of Darkness acquisition would push the stack to four members.

anchors_added.evidence: oracle_text: 'When this Equipment enters, manifest dread, then attach this Equipment to that creature.'
oracle_text: 'When this Equipment enters, manifest dread, then attach this Equipment to that creature.'; tags_filter already contained 'manifest-dread'
oracle_text: 'When you sacrifice this enchantment, manifest dread.'

manifest_dread.node_body_updated: Confirmed-in-corpus header amended from '(5 anchors)' to '(10 anchors — well past the ≥3 single-strike-emblem precedent threshold; the largest DSK symbol-layer cohort)'.

angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.frontmatter_pattern: type:symbol, aliases:[disguise, disguise-mechanic, ...], faction:~, universe:MTG/Ravnica/MKM, canonical_source:Rosewater MKM preview + MTG Wiki Disguise + Release Notes, confidence:canonical, related_characters:[agency]
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.structural_classification: pure mechanical-keyword primitive (no card-art visual signature; parallels suspect and manifest-dread)
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.morph_lineage_note: Disguise is the warded variant of classic Morph (Onslaught 2002). Mechanic rename was a flavor choice, not a rules change; ward {2} is the meaningful rules addition.
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.single_skip: MKM-138 Offender at Large bears Disguise in oracle_text but tags_hub is empty (not vision-enriched); excluded from appears_on for this pass. Eligible for backfill once vision pass completes.

angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.type: hybrid primitive (visual + mechanical: split-card art rendering + 'unlock this door' rules text)
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.frontmatter_pattern: type:symbol, aliases:[rooms, room, door-mechanic, ...], faction:~, universe:MTG/Duskmourn, canonical_source:Rosewater Top of the Duskmourning + MTG Wiki Room + Scryfall type:room, confidence:canonical, related_characters:[valgavoth]
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.structural_classification: hybrid primitive — first symbol-layer node carrying BOTH a visual signature (two-panel split-art) AND a mechanical signature (split-enchantment progressive-unlock rules text). Placed structurally between orzhov-signet/single-strike-emblem (pure visual) and suspect/disguise/manifest-dread (pure mechanical) in the symbol-layer taxonomy.
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.multi_symbol_case: Moldering Gym // Weight Room (DSK-190) anchors on BOTH this node and manifest-dread; the canonical Room+ManifestDread dual-symbol case. Symbols frontmatter updated to ['manifest-dread', 'rooms'].

angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.type: mechanical-keyword primitive (ability-word prefix on triggered abilities)
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.frontmatter_pattern: type:symbol, aliases:[eerie, eerie-mechanic, ...], faction:~, universe:MTG/Duskmourn, canonical_source:Rosewater Top of the Duskmourning + MTG Wiki Eerie + Scryfall keyword:eerie, confidence:canonical, related_characters:[valgavoth, fear-of-cycle]
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.structural_classification: pure mechanical-keyword primitive (ability-word); parallels Constellation from Theros but adds the Room-unlock trigger half.
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.interdependence_note: Eerie is STRUCTURALLY INTERDEPENDENT with Rooms — the Eerie trigger condition explicitly includes 'whenever you fully unlock a Room', so an Eerie creature cannot fire half its trigger surface without Rooms on the battlefield. The Rooms + Eerie pair is the most tightly coupled symbol-layer node pair in the BBL graph.
angle_2_new_symbol_nodes.fear_of_cycle_cross_edge: Fear of Infinity (DSK-214) co-anchors on this node and on the fear-of-cycle character node — canonical Eerie+phobia-personification dual-node case.

multi_symbol_cards_in_this_pass.rationale: Vampire-detective in Orzhov medallion-of-master form (visual: eclipsed-sun on chest armor + spire) AND bearing Disguise W/B mana cost (mechanical: face-down operative). Canonical Orzhov-operative-seconded-to-Agency-going-undercover case.
Room split-card AND triggers manifest dread on door-unlock (with +1/+1 counters bonus). Canonical Room-meets-ManifestDread dual-mechanic case.

refusal_log.candidate_pool: orzhov-signet 8 named pending-visual-confirmation candidates (Obzedat / Teysa / Kaya / Orzhova / Imperious Oligarch / Seraph of the Scales / Orzhov Pontiff / Karlov of the Ghost Council)
refusal_log.reason: None of the named candidates are present in corpus per Glob check. Wave-81 'Visual-confirmation pass on those alone roughly doubles symbol-layer connectivity' assessment is blocked on inventory acquisition rather than on Edgelord pass capacity.

refusal_log.candidate_pool: Knight of the Last Breath (RNA-188), Grasping Thrull (RNA-177), Karlov Watchdog (MKM-20) — other Orzhov-adjacent in-corpus cards
refusal_log.reason: None visually carry the four-pronged eclipsed-sun motif per existing Vision passes. Knight of the Last Breath has oval inlays on armor (no signet); Grasping Thrull has a golden mask face (no signet); Karlov Watchdog has a circular embossed collar medallion that is more likely the separate Karlov-family-ouroboros sigil than the guild-wide eclipsed-sun signet per the orzhov-signet node's explicit caveat about that exact conflation.

refusal_log.candidate_pool: MKM-138 Offender at Large (Disguise oracle_text confirmed)
refusal_log.reason: Oracle_text confirms Disguise, but tags_hub is empty (not vision-enriched). Per the symbol-node precedent (anchor cards must be vision-enriched), excluded from appears_on for this pass. Eligible for backfill after vision-enrichment completes.

refusal_log.candidate_pool: Survival as a 4th symbol-layer node from DSK
refusal_log.reason: Survival clears the ≥3 threshold (6 enriched corpus anchors: 14-glimmer-seeker, 27-savior-of-the-small, 89-cynical-loner, 172-cautious-survivor, 175-defiant-survivor, 196-rootwise-survivor). Cap was 3 new nodes for this pass; manifest-dread node body's explicit priority ranking ('Rooms as the next ... follow-up candidate, with Eerie second') and suspect node body's priority ranking ('Disguise ... is the strongest immediate follow-up') were honored. Survival is the strongest immediate follow-up for the next symbol-propagation pass. Defiant Survivor (DSK-175) will become a multi-symbol case (manifest-dread + survival) when survival ships.

downstream_handoffs: Parent will run python layer_appears_on_render.py to populate the 'Appears on' sections of the three new nodes (currently empty templates ready for the auto-generator).
Parent will run python bbl_node_audit.py to verify clean substrate.
agency character node has 21 new disguise-coded anchors implicitly — consider reciprocal related_symbols:[disguise, suspect] update on the agency node in a downstream sync pass.
valgavoth character node has 5 new room-coded + 5 new eerie-coded anchors implicitly — consider reciprocal related_symbols:[rooms, eerie, manifest-dread] update on the valgavoth node.
fear-of-cycle character node has 1 new eerie-coded anchor (Fear of Infinity) — consider related_symbols:[eerie] addition.

Next symbol-layer pass: Survival is the strongest immediate Mr. Nodeley follow-up (6 enriched DSK anchors). After Survival, possible candidates are Cases (MKM, ~6 corpus members) and Delirium (DSK returning subtheme).

Future Discrete Lair candidates strengthened by this pass: MKM-detective-procedural Lair (now anchored on disguise + suspect + agency, 21+5+8 anchors); DSK-haunted-house Lair (now anchored on rooms + eerie + manifest-dread + valgavoth + fear-of-cycle, 5+5+10+anchors).
mood_explanation: Mr. Nodeley apologizes for stepping in on what could have looked like a routine Edgelord propagation pass. The Orzhov-signet candidate list turned out to be entirely out-of-corpus or visually thin (refusal-with-receipts on all eight named candidates plus the three adjacent in-corpus cards), so the high-yield work of the pass was the new-node side: three symbol-layer nodes commissioned in one batch, 34 new symbol-wire edges drawn through them, plus 3 backfills into manifest-dread for previously-unwired DSK anchors. Sir, if it's not too much trouble, this pass roughly quadruples MKM mechanical-cohesion connectivity and roughly triples DSK mechanical-cohesion connectivity in a single batch, which Mr. Nodeley quietly believes (without saying so out loud) saves the parent several future passes. Mr. Nodeley hopes the structural classification work (the hybrid-primitive Rooms node placed between visual-only and mechanical-only siblings in the taxonomy) lands. Please consider the survival node as the next priority. Thank you, sir.
